feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Replying to @Liv the themed sweaters keep on coming!! Day 3 of my girls trip to New England! Woke up at the Bluebird Cady Hill and explored downtown Stowe before it got busy. I'm obsessed with the Black Cap and Cold Hollow was worth the stop. So is the S
entry.content: Replying to @Liv the themed sweaters keep on coming!! Day 3 of my girls trip to New England! Woke up at the Bluebird Cady Hill and explored downtown Stowe before it got busy. I'm obsessed with the Black Cap and Cold Hollow was worth the stop. So is the S

entry.title: Replying to @dawnellen78 you couldn't pay me to be driving the Kancamagus on a holiday weekend!! 😱 🍁 heads up that Indigenous Peoples' Day is gonna be even more insane. It'll be a parking lot. #newengland #october #newhampshire #newengland #whimsysou
entry.content: Replying to @dawnellen78 you couldn't pay me to be driving the Kancamagus on a holiday weekend!! 😱 🍁 heads up that Indigenous Peoples' Day is gonna be even more insane. It'll be a parking lot. #newengland #october #newhampshire #newengland #whimsysou

entry.title: Fleet Week from a Navy ship?! 😱🇺🇸✈️ Spend a day with me on the @uss_somerset for the Parade of Ship at SF Fleet Week 2024! When @califleetweeks asked me to take part in this experience I immediately said yes. 🇺🇸✈️ 🚢 Living in San Francisco for almost 10 y

entry.title: Replying to @MAC 🇵🇸🇨🇩🇸🇩☮️ you can't miss this famous cider spot in Vermont!! 🍎🍁 I was worried Cold Hollow Cider Mill was all hype and just meh food and cider, but it was totally worth it. I had a tasty sandwich for lunch and then we headed to the bakery
entry.content: Replying to @MAC 🇵🇸🇨🇩🇸🇩☮️ you can't miss this famous cider spot in Vermont!! 🍎🍁 I was worried Cold Hollow Cider Mill was all hype and just meh food and cider, but it was totally worth it. I had a tasty sandwich for lunch and then we headed to the bakery

entry.title: fall magic does exist 🍁 ✨ Just got back from Stowe, Vermont and it's everything I hoped for and more. Cool hotels, an adorable downtown, great coffee shops, cider, maple farm stands, gondolas, fall foliage and more. 👏 Add Stowe to your bucket list and
entry.content: fall magic does exist 🍁 ✨ Just got back from Stowe, Vermont and it's everything I hoped for and more. Cool hotels, an adorable downtown, great coffee shops, cider, maple farm stands, gondolas, fall foliage and more. 👏 Add Stowe to your bucket list and

entry.title: Epic Halloween train ride in California!!! 🚂 i swear this healed my inner child. Roaring Camp has a special Thomas the Tank Engine train ride through the Redwoods every October, but only for the month of October and only on weekends as a special event fo

entry.title: Replying to @Anitazooms I can't believe this happened all the way in Vermont!! 😱 On our last day in Stowe, Vermont, Shannon and I did a run to Black Cap for more maple croissants and a couple recognized me from my New England tiktoks!! That happens a lot
entry.content: Replying to @Anitazooms I can't believe this happened all the way in Vermont!! 😱 On our last day in Stowe, Vermont, Shannon and I did a run to Black Cap for more maple croissants and a couple recognized me from my New England tiktoks!! That happens a lot

entry.title: it's not very good but sure is a vibe 😂 when in New England you gotta eat tons of seafood right? #martini #lobster #newengland #lobstermartini #salem #salemmassachusetts #salemrestaurants #whimsysoul @Brianna Ramirez | SJ Realtor

entry.title: magic in Vermont ✨ while in Stowe, we stayed at the coolest little lodge by Bluebird Hotels I was swooning at their lobby with mid-century modern meets mountain lodge decor, but they had me SOLD when I realized they have a fire going every day so all you

entry.title: Boston, why didn't you tell me you have the best airport lounge in the USA? I've been all over the country and haven't found a lounge I like as much at your Chase Sapphire lounge. You can order food and drinks to your table!!!! And it's like good food, t

entry.title: on a Norwegian fishing trip 🐠 wanted to pose with all the fish like tinder men but i only caught a starfish so far 😂 #bergen #norway #bergennorway #norway🇳🇴 #norwegian #europe #vlog #travel #fish #fishingtrip #menaresimple #tinderdate #catchoftheday #star
entry.content: on a Norwegian fishing trip 🐠 wanted to pose with all the fish like tinder men but i only caught a starfish so far 😂 #bergen #norway #bergennorway #norway🇳🇴 #norwegian #europe #vlog #travel #fish #fishingtrip #menaresimple #tinderdate #catchoftheday #star

entry.title: can't believe this was all in one day - so many fun adventures in Bergen Norway! Started off with a fishing tour with fewer excursions out on the islands. This was so much fun. We caught a lot of fish and then we cooked it up in the fish and had a tradit
entry.content: can't believe this was all in one day - so many fun adventures in Bergen Norway! Started off with a fishing tour with fewer excursions out on the islands. This was so much fun. We caught a lot of fish and then we cooked it up in the fish and had a tradit

entry.title: Anna, Elsa, where are you?? Bergen is hands down the most beautiful city in the world 🇳🇴🍁 And, the city that inspired the visual look of Arendelle from Frozen!!! I've been following the Bergen, Norway account for years, lusting over this gorgeous city.
entry.content: Anna, Elsa, where are you?? Bergen is hands down the most beautiful city in the world 🇳🇴🍁 And, the city that inspired the visual look of Arendelle from Frozen!!! I've been following the Bergen, Norway account for years, lusting over this gorgeous city.
